info.name: GraphQL – Jobs Module
info.description: Jobs: job, jobs; createEmailFinderExport, createContact360Export, createContact360Import, createAppointmentImport, retryJob. Variables: use camelCase (jobId, inputCsvKey, outputPrefix, s3Bucket, retryCount, savedSearchId, vql, pageSize). See sql/apis/16_JOBS_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query GetJob($jobId: ID!) { jobs { job(jobId: $jobId) { id jobId jobType status statusPayload createdAt } } }","variables":{"jobId":"{{jobId}}"}}

body: query":"query ListJobs($limit: Int, $offset: Int) { jobs { jobs(limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { jobs { id jobId jobType status } pageInfo { total } } } }","variables":{"limit":20,"offset":0}}

query":"mutation CreateEmailFinderExport($input: CreateEmailFinderExportInput!) { jobs { createEmailFinderExport(input: $input) { jobId status } } }","variables":{"input":{"inputCsvKey":"upload/file.csv","outputPrefix":"export"}}

query":"mutation CreateContact360Export($input: CreateContact360ExportInput!) { jobs { createContact360Export(input: $input) { jobId status } } }","variables":{"input":{"outputPrefix":"export","service":"contact","vql":{},"pageSize":500}}
query":"mutation RetryJob($input: RetryJobInput!) { jobs { retryJob(input: $input) { jobId status } } }","variables":{"input":{"jobId":"{{jobId}}","retryCount":3}}
